features.description: Add Session model to Prisma schema with id, userId, token (unique), expiresAt, createdAt. Create migration and generate Prisma client.
expectedBehavior: Session model added with UUID id, userId relation, unique token, expiresAt DateTime
Migration creates session table
prisma generate succeeds

features.description: Create src/lib/session.ts with createSession(userId), validateSession(token), deleteSession(token), cleanupExpiredSessions(). Uses UUID v4 for tokens. Sets HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Strict; Max-Age=86400 cookies.
expectedBehavior: createSession creates DB record with UUID token, 24h expiry, returns token
validateSession returns userId if valid/unexpired, null otherwise
deleteSession removes session from DB
cleanupExpiredSessions deletes all past expiresAt records

features.description: Modify POST /api/auth/login to create session after successful bcrypt validation. Return session and CSRF cookies. Keep rate limiting placeholder.
expectedBehavior: Valid credentials -> createSession(userId) -> Set-Cookie with session token
Invalid credentials -> 401, rate limit check runs first

features.description: Modify POST /api/auth/register to create session after successful user creation. Return session and CSRF cookies.
preconditions: User creation logic exists in register endpoint
expectedBehavior: Valid registration -> createSession(userId) -> Set-Cookie with session token
Duplicate username -> 409 without session

features.description: Update src/middleware.ts to read whodo_session cookie, call validateSession(), set X-User-Id header if valid. Redirect to / if invalid/missing for /dashboard routes.
expectedBehavior: Valid session cookie -> request proceeds with X-User-Id header
Missing/invalid cookie on /dashboard -> redirect to /
API routes (/api/*) -> 401 on missing/invalid session

features.description: Update src/lib/registry.tsx to read session from server-side cookies instead of localStorage. Use context to get userId from headers (passed via middleware).
preconditions: Middleware sets X-User-Id header on valid sessions
expectedBehavior: setUsername reads from cookie/header instead of localStorage
Logout clears session cookie (not just localStorage)

features.description: Create src/lib/rateLimit.ts with in-memory Map. limitLogin(ip, username) returns { allowed, remaining } and blocks after 5 attempts in 15 min. limitRegister(ip) similarly.
expectedBehavior: limitLogin tracks (ip, username) key
After 5 attempts in 15 min, returns { allowed: false, remaining: 0 }
limitRegister tracks ip key only

features.description: Integrate rate limiting into login endpoint. Check limitLogin before credential validation. Return 429 if rate limited.
expectedBehavior: Rate limited request returns 429 with body { error: 'Too many attempts' }
Non-rate-limited request proceeds to credential validation

features.description: Integrate rate limiting into register endpoint. Check limitRegister before user creation.
expectedBehavior: Rate limited request returns 429
Non-rate-limited request proceeds to user creation

features.description: Add CSRF validation to all mutating endpoints (POST/PUT/DELETE on /api/*). Validate x-csrf-token header against session's stored CSRF secret. Return 403 on mismatch.
expectedBehavior: Missing x-csrf-token header -> 403
Mismatched token -> 403
Valid token -> proceeds to handler

features.description: Fix race conditions in src/app/projects/[projectId]/members/page.tsx. handleAddMembers and handleRemoveMember must use functional state updates: setMembers(prev => [...prev, new]) pattern.
expectedBehavior: Rapidly adding 3+ members -> all 3 appear in list
Rapidly removing 2+ members -> correct ones removed

features.description: Fix src/app/projects/[projectId]/page.tsx loadStories to check res.ok before res.json(). Fix PUT/DELETE on non-existent resources to return 404 instead of 500.
expectedBehavior: Non-2xx response -> throw Error with response text, not JSON parse crash
Non-existent resource -> 404, not 500

features.description: Fix invalid date 'November 31, 2022' -> 'November 30, 2022' in story dates. Fix Project model userId to use String (foreign key ID) not username.
expectedBehavior: Date rendering shows November 30 for last day
Project.userId stores numeric ID, not username string

features.description: Add auth check to members page. Redirect to / if no valid session. Import and use session validation from lib/session.ts.
expectedBehavior: Access /projects/1/members without session -> redirect to /
Access with valid session -> page renders

features.description: Update dashboard createProject to show error message to user when API call fails. Handle error state in form submission.
expectedBehavior: Failed createProject -> error message shown in UI
User can retry after seeing error

features.description: Fix src/app/dashboard/page.tsx: when velocity array is empty, return 'green' health instead of falling through to 'red'.
expectedBehavior: Project with empty velocity -> shows GREEN health
Project with negative velocity -> shows RED health
